creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 220743
broot-1.0.9.diff

* Fixes configuration file quotation bug[1]
  seen in 1.0.7 and upwards. This has been
  addressed in the latest release, 1.0.9.

[1] https://github.com/Canop/broot/issues/316 

Changelog:

 * https://github.com/canop/broot/releases/v1.0.9

QA:

 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 12.2-RELEASE, amd64).

MFH: Yes (Bugfix release, merge to quarterly branch).
